heading: Definitions and grant conditions
label: 10465 Definitions and grant conditions
text: In this subchapter the definitions and grant conditions in shall apply.section 12291 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3796hh–4 of Title 42

Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to repeal by , , .section 2106 of Pub. L. 90–351section 3796hh–5 of Title 42Pub. L. 109–271, § 2(f)(2)120 Stat. 752Aug. 12, 2006

Amendments2006— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section consisted of pars. (1) to (3) defining for purposes of this subchapter “domestic violence”, “protection order”, and “dating violence”.Pub. L. 109–1622000—Par. (3). added par. (3).Pub. L. 106–386
